TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kiwit (kamu nu Hulam: śĶ∑ťáĎś≤ô) masa dumaay a ngangan Lygodium japonicum (Thunb.) Sw. (mitesekay a ngangan)Lygodium japonicum (Thunb.) Sw. śĶ∑ťáĎś≤ôÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Schizaeaceae śĶ∑ťáĎś≤ôŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)kiwit a su (tada ngangan)ding-chuei-teng, ding-dang-mau, shiu-shiu-yaw, tiee-se-tsau, luo-wan-terng, tu-se-tsau, fun-wi-tsau, ha-muo-terng, ku-teng, cen-cuo-maq-ci, cen-cuo-maw, terng-cuo-maw-tzyy, cin-sha-terng, tie-sian-cau, cuo-cuan-teng, ting-ta-teng, mun-ku-terng Japanese Climbing Fern (igu a ngangan)Japanese Climbing Fern ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Lisavkuis Sia Sisila Ninav,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kiwit,ťĄí Tariri Morapurapu,ťėŅÁĺé Alylulu,śéíÁĀ£ Sas,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Saisi,ś≥įťõÖ Kanawaru,śéíÁĀ£ Sasuru (kamu nu binacadan)BununŚłÉŤĺ≤ Lisavkuis Sia Sisila Ninav,SakidayaśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kiwit,CoťĄí Tariri Morapurapu,AmisťėŅÁĺé Alylulu,PaywanśéíÁĀ£ Sas,Lukayť≠ĮŚáĪ Saisi,Tayaluś≥įťõÖ Kanawaru,PaywanśéíÁĀ£ Sasuru (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Cu, Amis, Paywan, Lukay, Tayalu, paywan kaliwasak nu langaw Taywan itini i cayka talakaway 600 kun-ciay a lilisan nu kilangkilangan, buyu atu dadan i sasa' nu kilanglilangan, maadih numita ku langaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sasapaiyuan nasapayuwan, kala sicesicedaman adidi ku cueded, patahekal tu i udip a bayduk, pakaisi, tatengaay nu sasapayuen sa u cacebuwan, siba'tu i cacebuwan, lacus ku besi, adada ku takulaw, nika beluhan, kanmaw, adada ku ngipen, bala' , tamusi nu tibeni‚Ä¶.nu adada. (kamu nu Hulam: ...Á≠ČÁĖĺÁóÖ.) mihida tu langaw musakamu kiwit han u kiwit a lalangawan kiwait han nu mihmihcaan a milaladay nu langdawan nu badukukan a langawan kunuheni, tanayu han makaala tu lima a cong-chyy sa, yadah ku ciit, sanglacay ku adidiay nu banuh. papah nu akaway nai ku sausi tuni kaudip, papah han mahida u tatipeluk ahebal ku papah, tanayu makaala tu tulu ~lima a cung-fen, ahebal han 0.5 a cung-fen, papah idaw ku nalusalusan atu caaya ka sasitudung tu pela'. nu papahan, mamuniay a sasapalan inikudan nu papah, masilac mahida' u tipus ku sika silac. (kamu nu Hulam: .) wayway nu picidekan nu langaw milalatay unu badukukan a langwan, lamit atu akaway aadidi', akaway mahida maacakay nu lutuk, yadah ku ciit , langaw sa ilala',u langaw makaala tu pina a cungchyy, mamuni' aadidi ku banuh, namaka lala' a muculal nu masayan, unu cacaya ku napapahan, papah nu akaway nai ' ku hedek amulangaw. nu cacaya a papahan malatusa i akaway, duhepic, aadidi' mahida nalimaan kunika cacelit atu mala tuluay ku celit, ihekal ku ngitngit, nu papahan, sapalan a papahan aadidi' apuyu, hatidaay tu nika ilabu nuni kacelitan nu papah hatida u taludu'. sasapalay a kitidaan, macacelcel I papahan. sasapalan matahap nu kines a paph, mahida u ti'kuk ku wayway. mala tusa i adidiay nu papahan, idaw ku satabu. (kamu nu Hulam:ŤĎČÁāļ1-2 ,ŚÖ∑Ś≠ĘŤÜú.) munganguay a kiwit , papah nu akaway patelek sa mala papah, katinengan u angngan . (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit han umilaladay namin ku sausi, pasayda kawili kunika ta pabaw a mulangaw, pangangan han tu kawiliay a langaw han, caay kaw masayan ku langaw nida, milaladay han caay kaw akaway. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit langw sahenay patelek sa mahida u lutuk, kilul sat u langaw maudip, papah nu akaway tanayusa, u tungduh' kumi laladay. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit nu papah a akaway idaw ku salangawan, yalangaw pabaluhay tu akaway malaciit nida, sisa sa libedlibedsa tu dumaan a langawan, nika lalibetan mahida u langadaway a salil, nina langadaway a salil han naw nu cacaya a papahan lalad sananatu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwitan a langawan, masa batacay nu mala tusaay a adidaay nu papahan, caay kasi papahan, nama kayda namin i sasa nu akaway, taneng i pabaw nu papahan. sasapalan anu matuduh masuni, misa beladbelad, yumahida sa tuduhen misa tizina atu sapi salngsay sa. Taywan tulu a mang enem a malebut a pinfang-kongliay, maka lala'tu enemay a pinaan nu badukukan a langawan, ulala kuhan numita amiadih tu langawan, tada madecdec tu, u langawan nu "babadukukan han kuni pangangan". han na badukukan (caaya kay kilangan), idanamin i lala' atu i kilagkilangan masaupu amulangaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit han taneng mala laic, anu maka adih kita tu mahidaay u masay a langawan, taneng telengen, taneng a sapibalud. nina masayan a langawan, alawhan u badukukay a langawan han, idaw ku " kitait satanayuay nu papahan langawan han " . isasa nu buyubuyuan a kilngakilangan ku langaw nina kiwit, idadan hina adih kita tu langaw nu kiwitan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) badukukan tusa ku napapahan a wayway, cacay han patalaayaw tu cilal saka tanektek nu papahan, duma satu sasipappalan tu papahan. (kamu nu Hulam: "Ś≠ĘŚ≠źŤĎČ".) hina adih kita tu badukukan a langawan, misa sengi kunuheni, anu caay piadih kita tu nikudan nu papah tu sisasapalan, utiih kita amisa wantan tu langawan, u kiwi than caykalcad, adih sa matineng tu kita. hamawsa kita mimelaw tu kiwit a langawan nu papah, maka adih kitatu mahidaay u taludu nu papahan, atu papah nu sadikuday idaw ku adidiay a masa babuya atu sasapalan nikaudipan a papahan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) milaladay nu kiwitan a langawan, mahida u akaway, alawhan u papah nu akaway, kiwithan nutatengaay a langaw namaka lamit atu akaway namaka lala amulangaw, namaka lalaay numu langaway a milaladay, unu cacaya ana papahan. kiwit a papah nu akaway hidasatu amulangaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit han taneng malalaic, itini i lalangawan han nu kiwitsa, taneng a sangaan tu kanas, anu necnecen mala babanawan numita tu tupu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) bakahen numita i babihan mala damek nu lala', (kamu nu Hulam: .) ikanhan, numa ngaduay a langaw han taneng kanen, kiwi than taneng sangasiben mala nanum, miahemaw tu udip, caay pingaluh. mangaduay nu papah tuktuken palamlam tu char-you sakay beluh, matuduh nu lamal. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ÁĀęŚā∑.) (kamu nu Hulam: u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: kiwit (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***) masa dumaaj a ŇčaŇčan r~…ĺjgodium japoni ¶um (tńßunb.) sw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sasapaijuan nasapajuwan, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôsi ¶…ôdaman adidi ku ¶u…ôd…ôd, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu i udip a bajduk, pakaisi, tat…ôŇčaaj nu sasapaju…ôn sa u ¶a ¶…ôbuwan, siba Ē~ °tu i ¶a ¶…ôbuwan, r~…ĺa ¶us ku b…ôsi, adada ku takur~…ĺaw, nika b…ôr~…ĺuńßan, kanmaw, adada ku Ňčip…ôn, bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° , tamusi nu tib…ôni*.nu adada. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ...***.) mińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu kiwit ńßan u kiwit a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan kiwait ńßan nu mińßmińß ¶aan a mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj nu r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan kunuńß…ôni, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a ¶oŇč- ¶ńßjj sa, jadańß ku ¶iit, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku adidiaj nu banuńß. papańß nu akawaj nai ku sausi tuni kaudip, papańß ńßan mańßida u tatip…ôr~…ĺuk ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku papańß, tanaju makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu ~r~…ĺima a ¶uŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan *.* a ¶uŇč-f…ôn, papańß idaw ku nar~…ĺusar~…ĺusan atu ¶aaja ka sasituduŇč tu p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °. nu papańßan, mamuniaj a sasapar~…ĺan inikudan nu papańß, masir~…ĺa ¶ mańßida Ē~ ° u tipus ku sika sir~…ĺa ¶. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) wajwaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺaŇčaw mir~…ĺar~…ĺataj unu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčwan, r~…ĺamit atu akawaj aadidi Ē~ °, akawaj mańßida maa ¶akaj nu r~…ĺutuk, jadańß ku ¶iit , r~…ĺaŇčaw sa ir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °,u r~…ĺaŇčaw makaar~…ĺa tu pina a ¶uŇč ¶ńßjj, mamuni Ē~ ° aadidi ku banuńß, namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ nu masajan, unu ¶a ¶aja ku napapańßan, papańß nu akawaj nai Ē~ ° ku ńß…ôd…ôk amur~…ĺaŇčaw. nu ¶a ¶aja a papańßan mar~…ĺatusa i akawaj, duńß…ôpi ¶, aadidi Ē~ ° mańßida nar~…ĺimaan kunika ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺit atu mar~…ĺa tur~…ĺuaj ku ¶…ôr~…ĺit, ińß…ôkar~…ĺ ku ŇčitŇčit, nu papańßan, sapar~…ĺan a papańßan aadidi Ē~ ° apuju, ńßatidaaj tu nika ir~…ĺabu nuni ka ¶…ôr~…ĺitan nu papańß ńßatida u tar~…ĺudu Ē~ °. sasapar~…ĺaj a kitidaan, ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ i papańßan. sasapar~…ĺan matańßap nu kin…ôs a papńß, mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk ku wajwaj. mar~…ĺa tusa i adidiaj nu papańßan, idaw ku satabu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***-* ,***.) muŇčaŇčuaj a kiwit , papańß nu akawaj pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa mar~…ĺa papańß, katin…ôŇčan u aŇčŇčan . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit ńßan umir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj namin ku sausi, pasajda kawir~…ĺi kunika ta pabaw a mur~…ĺaŇčaw, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kawir~…ĺiaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan, ¶aaj kaw masajan ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nida, mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj ńßan ¶aaj kaw akawaj. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit r~…ĺaŇčw sańß…ônaj pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa mańßida u r~…ĺutuk, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sat u r~…ĺaŇčaw maudip, papańß nu akawaj tanajusa, u tuŇčduńß Ē~ ° kumi r~…ĺar~…ĺadaj. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit nu papańß a akawaj idaw ku sar~…ĺaŇčawan, jar~…ĺaŇčaw pabar~…ĺuńßaj tu akawaj mar~…ĺa ¶iit nida, sisa sa r~…ĺib…ôdr~…ĺib…ôdsa tu dumaan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, nika r~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôtan mańßida u r~…ĺaŇčadawaj a sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, nina r~…ĺaŇčadawaj a sar~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßan naw nu ¶a ¶aja a papańßan r~…ĺar~…ĺad sananatu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwitan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, masa bata ¶aj nu mar~…ĺa tusaaj a adidaaj nu papańßan, ¶aaj kasi papańßan, nama kajda namin i sasa nu akawaj, tan…ôŇč i pabaw nu papańßan. sasapar~…ĺan anu matuduńß masuni, misa b…ôr~…ĺadb…ôr~…ĺad, jumańßida sa tuduńß…ôn misa tizina atu sapi sar~…ĺŇčsaj sa. tajwan tur~…ĺu a maŇč …ôn…ôm a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a pinfaŇč-koŇčr~…ĺiaj, maka r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °tu …ôn…ômaj a pinaan nu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, ur~…ĺar~…ĺa kuńßan numita amiadińß tu r~…ĺaŇčawan, tada mad…ô ¶d…ô ¶ tu, u r~…ĺaŇčawan nu "babadukukan ńßan kuni paŇčaŇčan". ńßan na badukukan ( ¶aaja kaj kir~…ĺaŇčan), idanamin i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu i kir~…ĺagkir~…ĺaŇčan masaupu amur~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit ńßan tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺai ¶, anu maka adińß kita tu mańßidaaj u masaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan, tan…ôŇč t…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôn, tan…ôŇč a sapibar~…ĺud. nina masajan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, ar~…ĺawńßan u badukukaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan, idaw ku " kitait satanajuaj nu papańßan r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan " . isasa nu bujubujuan a kir~…ĺŇčakir~…ĺaŇčan ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nina kiwit, idadan ńßina adińß kita tu r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kiwitan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) badukukan tusa ku napapańßan a wajwaj, ¶a ¶aj ńßan patar~…ĺaajaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ saka tan…ôkt…ôk nu papańßan, duma satu sasipappar~…ĺan tu papańßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: "***".) ńßina adińß kita tu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, misa s…ôŇči kunuńß…ôni, anu ¶aaj piadińß kita tu nikudan nu papańß tu sisasapar~…ĺan, utiińß kita amisa wantan tu r~…ĺaŇčawan, u kiwi tńßan ¶ajkar~…ĺ ¶ad, adińß sa matin…ôŇč tu kita. ńßamawsa kita mim…ôr~…ĺaw tu kiwit a r~…ĺaŇčawan nu papańß, maka adińß kitatu mańßidaaj u tar~…ĺudu nu papańßan, atu papańß nu sadikudaj idaw ku adidiaj a masa babuja atu sasapar~…ĺan nikaudipan a papańßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj nu kiwitan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, mańßida u akawaj, ar~…ĺawńßan u papańß nu akawaj, kiwitńßan nutat…ôŇčaaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw namaka r~…ĺamit atu akawaj namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺa amur~…ĺaŇčaw, namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj numu r~…ĺaŇčawaj a mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj, unu ¶a ¶aja ana papańßan. kiwit a papańß nu akawaj ńßidasatu amur~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit ńßan tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺai ¶, itini i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan nu kiwitsa, tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu kanas, anu n…ô ¶n…ô ¶…ôn mar~…ĺa babanawan numita tu tupu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) bakańß…ôn numita i babińßan mar~…ĺa dam…ôk nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ikanńßan, numa Ňčaduaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan tan…ôŇč kan…ôn, kiwi tńßan tan…ôŇč saŇčasib…ôn mar~…ĺa nanum, miańß…ômaw tu udip, ¶aaj piŇčar~…ĺuńß. maŇčaduaj nu papańß tuktuk…ôn par~…ĺamr~…ĺam tu ¶ńßar-jou sakaj b…ôr~…ĺuńß, matuduńß nu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,**.) (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: kiwit (kamu nu Hulam: śĶ∑ťáĎś≤ô) masa dumaay a ngangan Lygodium japonicum (Thunb.) Sw. (mitesekay a ngangan)Lygodium japonicum (Thunb.) Sw. śĶ∑ťáĎś≤ôÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Schizaeaceae śĶ∑ťáĎś≤ôŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)kiwit a su (tada ngangan)ding-chuei-teng, ding-dang-mau, shiu-shiu-yaw, tiee-se-tsau, luo-wan-terng, tu-se-tsau, fun-wi-tsau, ha-muo-terng, ku-teng, cen-cuo-maq-ci, cen-cuo-maw, terng-cuo-maw-tzyy, cin-sha-terng, tie-sian-cau, cuo-cuan-teng, ting-ta-teng, mun-ku-terng Japanese Climbing Fern (igu a ngangan)Japanese Climbing Fern ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Lisavkuis Sia Sisila Ninav,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kiwit,ťĄí Tariri Morapurapu,ťėŅÁĺé Alylulu,śéíÁĀ£ Sas,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Saisi,ś≥įťõÖ Kanawaru,śéíÁĀ£ Sasuru (kamu nu binacadan)BununŚłÉŤĺ≤ Lisavkuis Sia Sisila Ninav,SakidayaśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kiwit,CoťĄí Tariri Morapurapu,AmisťėŅÁĺé Alylulu,PaywanśéíÁĀ£ Sas,Lukayť≠ĮŚáĪ Saisi,Tayaluś≥įťõÖ Kanawaru,PaywanśéíÁĀ£ Sasuru (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Cu, Amis, Paywan, Lukay, Tayalu, paywan kaliwasak nu langaw Taywan itini i cayka talakaway 600 kun-ciay a lilisan nu kilangkilangan, buyu atu dadan i sasa' nu kilanglilangan, maadih numita ku langaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sasapaiyuan nasapayuwan, kala sicesicedaman adidi ku cueded, patahekal tu i udip a bayduk, pakaisi, tatengaay nu sasapayuen sa u cacebuwan, siba'tu i cacebuwan, lacus ku besi, adada ku takulaw, nika beluhan, kanmaw, adada ku ngipen, bala' , tamusi nu tibeni‚Ä¶.nu adada. (kamu nu Hulam: ...Á≠ČÁĖĺÁóÖ.) mihida tu langaw musakamu kiwit han u kiwit a lalangawan kiwait han nu mihmihcaan a milaladay nu langdawan nu badukukan a langawan kunuheni, tanayu han makaala tu lima a cong-chyy sa, yadah ku ciit, sanglacay ku adidiay nu banuh. papah nu akaway nai ku sausi tuni kaudip, papah han mahida u tatipeluk ahebal ku papah, tanayu makaala tu tulu ~lima a cung-fen, ahebal han 0.5 a cung-fen, papah idaw ku nalusalusan atu caaya ka sasitudung tu pela'. nu papahan, mamuniay a sasapalan inikudan nu papah, masilac mahida' u tipus ku sika silac. (kamu nu Hulam: .) wayway nu picidekan nu langaw milalatay unu badukukan a langwan, lamit atu akaway aadidi', akaway mahida maacakay nu lutuk, yadah ku ciit , langaw sa ilala',u langaw makaala tu pina a cungchyy, mamuni' aadidi ku banuh, namaka lala' a muculal nu masayan, unu cacaya ku napapahan, papah nu akaway nai ' ku hedek amulangaw. nu cacaya a papahan malatusa i akaway, duhepic, aadidi' mahida nalimaan kunika cacelit atu mala tuluay ku celit, ihekal ku ngitngit, nu papahan, sapalan a papahan aadidi' apuyu, hatidaay tu nika ilabu nuni kacelitan nu papah hatida u taludu'. sasapalay a kitidaan, macacelcel I papahan. sasapalan matahap nu kines a paph, mahida u ti'kuk ku wayway. mala tusa i adidiay nu papahan, idaw ku satabu. (kamu nu Hulam:ŤĎČÁāļ1-2 ,ŚÖ∑Ś≠ĘŤÜú.) munganguay a kiwit , papah nu akaway patelek sa mala papah, katinengan u angngan . (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit han umilaladay namin ku sausi, pasayda kawili kunika ta pabaw a mulangaw, pangangan han tu kawiliay a langaw han, caay kaw masayan ku langaw nida, milaladay han caay kaw akaway. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit langw sahenay patelek sa mahida u lutuk, kilul sat u langaw maudip, papah nu akaway tanayusa, u tungduh' kumi laladay. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit nu papah a akaway idaw ku salangawan, yalangaw pabaluhay tu akaway malaciit nida, sisa sa libedlibedsa tu dumaan a langawan, nika lalibetan mahida u langadaway a salil, nina langadaway a salil han naw nu cacaya a papahan lalad sananatu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwitan a langawan, masa batacay nu mala tusaay a adidaay nu papahan, caay kasi papahan, nama kayda namin i sasa nu akaway, taneng i pabaw nu papahan. sasapalan anu matuduh masuni, misa beladbelad, yumahida sa tuduhen misa tizina atu sapi salngsay sa. Taywan tulu a mang enem a malebut a pinfang-kongliay, maka lala'tu enemay a pinaan nu badukukan a langawan, ulala kuhan numita amiadih tu langawan, tada madecdec tu, u langawan nu "babadukukan han kuni pangangan". han na badukukan (caaya kay kilangan), idanamin i lala' atu i kilagkilangan masaupu amulangaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit han taneng mala laic, anu maka adih kita tu mahidaay u masay a langawan, taneng telengen, taneng a sapibalud. nina masayan a langawan, alawhan u badukukay a langawan han, idaw ku " kitait satanayuay nu papahan langawan han " . isasa nu buyubuyuan a kilngakilangan ku langaw nina kiwit, idadan hina adih kita tu langaw nu kiwitan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) badukukan tusa ku napapahan a wayway, cacay han patalaayaw tu cilal saka tanektek nu papahan, duma satu sasipappalan tu papahan. (kamu nu Hulam: "Ś≠ĘŚ≠źŤĎČ".) hina adih kita tu badukukan a langawan, misa sengi kunuheni, anu caay piadih kita tu nikudan nu papah tu sisasapalan, utiih kita amisa wantan tu langawan, u kiwi than caykalcad, adih sa matineng tu kita. hamawsa kita mimelaw tu kiwit a langawan nu papah, maka adih kitatu mahidaay u taludu nu papahan, atu papah nu sadikuday idaw ku adidiay a masa babuya atu sasapalan nikaudipan a papahan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) milaladay nu kiwitan a langawan, mahida u akaway, alawhan u papah nu akaway, kiwithan nutatengaay a langaw namaka lamit atu akaway namaka lala amulangaw, namaka lalaay numu langaway a milaladay, unu cacaya ana papahan. kiwit a papah nu akaway hidasatu amulangaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) kiwit han taneng malalaic, itini i lalangawan han nu kiwitsa, taneng a sangaan tu kanas, anu necnecen mala babanawan numita tu tupu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) bakahen numita i babihan mala damek nu lala', (kamu nu Hulam: .) ikanhan, numa ngaduay a langaw han taneng kanen, kiwi than taneng sangasiben mala nanum, miahemaw tu udip, caay pingaluh. mangaduay nu papah tuktuken palamlam tu char-you sakay beluh, matuduh nu lamal. (kamu nu Hulam: ,ÁĀęŚā∑.) (kamu nu Hulam: u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: kiwit (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***) masa dumaaj a ŇčaŇčan r~…ĺjgodium japoni ¶um (tńßunb.) sw. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)r~…ĺjgodium japoni ¶um (tńßunb.) sw. **** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)s ¶ńßiza…ôa ¶…ôa…ô **** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ŇčaŇčan)kiwit a su (tada ŇčaŇčan)diŇč- ¶ńßu…ôi-t…ôŇč, diŇč-daŇč-mau, sńßiu-sńßiu-jaw, ti…ô…ô-s…ô-tsau, r~…ĺuo-wan-t…ôrŇč, tu-s…ô-tsau, fun-wi-tsau, ńßa-muo-t…ôrŇč, ku-t…ôŇč, ¶…ôn- ¶uo-ma*- ¶i, ¶…ôn- ¶uo-maw, t…ôrŇč- ¶uo-maw-tzjj, ¶in-sńßa-t…ôrŇč, ti…ô-sian- ¶au, ¶uo- ¶uan-t…ôŇč, tiŇč-ta-t…ôŇč, mun-ku-t…ôrŇč *apan…ôs…ô ¶r~…ĺimbiŇč f…ôrn (igu a ŇčaŇčan)*apan…ôs…ô ¶r~…ĺimbiŇč f…ôrn ** r~…ĺisa*kuis sia sisir~…ĺa nina*,**** kiwit,* tariri morapurapu,** ar~…ĺjr~…ĺur~…ĺu,** sas,** saisi,** kanawaru,** sasuru (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun** r~…ĺisa*kuis sia sisir~…ĺa nina*,sakidaja**** kiwit, ¶o* tariri morapurapu,amis** ar~…ĺjr~…ĺur~…ĺu,pajwan** sas,r~…ĺukaj** saisi,tajar~…ĺu** kanawaru,pajwan** sasuru (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶u, amis, pajwan, r~…ĺukaj, tajar~…ĺu, pajwan kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw tajwan itini i ¶ajka tar~…ĺakawaj *** kun- ¶iaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺisan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, buju atu dadan i sasa Ē~ ° nu kir~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺir~…ĺaŇčan, maadińß numita ku r~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sasapaijuan nasapajuwan, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôsi ¶…ôdaman adidi ku ¶u…ôd…ôd, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu i udip a bajduk, pakaisi, tat…ôŇčaaj nu sasapaju…ôn sa u ¶a ¶…ôbuwan, siba Ē~ °tu i ¶a ¶…ôbuwan, r~…ĺa ¶us ku b…ôsi, adada ku takur~…ĺaw, nika b…ôr~…ĺuńßan, kanmaw, adada ku Ňčip…ôn, bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° , tamusi nu tib…ôni*.nu adada. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ...***.) mińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu kiwit ńßan u kiwit a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan kiwait ńßan nu mińßmińß ¶aan a mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj nu r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan kunuńß…ôni, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a ¶oŇč- ¶ńßjj sa, jadańß ku ¶iit, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku adidiaj nu banuńß. papańß nu akawaj nai ku sausi tuni kaudip, papańß ńßan mańßida u tatip…ôr~…ĺuk ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku papańß, tanaju makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu ~r~…ĺima a ¶uŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan *.* a ¶uŇč-f…ôn, papańß idaw ku nar~…ĺusar~…ĺusan atu ¶aaja ka sasituduŇč tu p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °. nu papańßan, mamuniaj a sasapar~…ĺan inikudan nu papańß, masir~…ĺa ¶ mańßida Ē~ ° u tipus ku sika sir~…ĺa ¶. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) wajwaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺaŇčaw mir~…ĺar~…ĺataj unu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčwan, r~…ĺamit atu akawaj aadidi Ē~ °, akawaj mańßida maa ¶akaj nu r~…ĺutuk, jadańß ku ¶iit , r~…ĺaŇčaw sa ir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °,u r~…ĺaŇčaw makaar~…ĺa tu pina a ¶uŇč ¶ńßjj, mamuni Ē~ ° aadidi ku banuńß, namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ nu masajan, unu ¶a ¶aja ku napapańßan, papańß nu akawaj nai Ē~ ° ku ńß…ôd…ôk amur~…ĺaŇčaw. nu ¶a ¶aja a papańßan mar~…ĺatusa i akawaj, duńß…ôpi ¶, aadidi Ē~ ° mańßida nar~…ĺimaan kunika ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺit atu mar~…ĺa tur~…ĺuaj ku ¶…ôr~…ĺit, ińß…ôkar~…ĺ ku ŇčitŇčit, nu papańßan, sapar~…ĺan a papańßan aadidi Ē~ ° apuju, ńßatidaaj tu nika ir~…ĺabu nuni ka ¶…ôr~…ĺitan nu papańß ńßatida u tar~…ĺudu Ē~ °. sasapar~…ĺaj a kitidaan, ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ i papańßan. sasapar~…ĺan matańßap nu kin…ôs a papńß, mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk ku wajwaj. mar~…ĺa tusa i adidiaj nu papańßan, idaw ku satabu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***-* ,***.) muŇčaŇčuaj a kiwit , papańß nu akawaj pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa mar~…ĺa papańß, katin…ôŇčan u aŇčŇčan . (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit ńßan umir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj namin ku sausi, pasajda kawir~…ĺi kunika ta pabaw a mur~…ĺaŇčaw, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kawir~…ĺiaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan, ¶aaj kaw masajan ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nida, mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj ńßan ¶aaj kaw akawaj. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit r~…ĺaŇčw sańß…ônaj pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa mańßida u r~…ĺutuk, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sat u r~…ĺaŇčaw maudip, papańß nu akawaj tanajusa, u tuŇčduńß Ē~ ° kumi r~…ĺar~…ĺadaj. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit nu papańß a akawaj idaw ku sar~…ĺaŇčawan, jar~…ĺaŇčaw pabar~…ĺuńßaj tu akawaj mar~…ĺa ¶iit nida, sisa sa r~…ĺib…ôdr~…ĺib…ôdsa tu dumaan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, nika r~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôtan mańßida u r~…ĺaŇčadawaj a sar~…ĺir~…ĺ, nina r~…ĺaŇčadawaj a sar~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßan naw nu ¶a ¶aja a papańßan r~…ĺar~…ĺad sananatu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwitan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, masa bata ¶aj nu mar~…ĺa tusaaj a adidaaj nu papańßan, ¶aaj kasi papańßan, nama kajda namin i sasa nu akawaj, tan…ôŇč i pabaw nu papańßan. sasapar~…ĺan anu matuduńß masuni, misa b…ôr~…ĺadb…ôr~…ĺad, jumańßida sa tuduńß…ôn misa tizina atu sapi sar~…ĺŇčsaj sa. tajwan tur~…ĺu a maŇč …ôn…ôm a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a pinfaŇč-koŇčr~…ĺiaj, maka r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °tu …ôn…ômaj a pinaan nu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, ur~…ĺar~…ĺa kuńßan numita amiadińß tu r~…ĺaŇčawan, tada mad…ô ¶d…ô ¶ tu, u r~…ĺaŇčawan nu "babadukukan ńßan kuni paŇčaŇčan". ńßan na badukukan ( ¶aaja kaj kir~…ĺaŇčan), idanamin i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu i kir~…ĺagkir~…ĺaŇčan masaupu amur~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit ńßan tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺai ¶, anu maka adińß kita tu mańßidaaj u masaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan, tan…ôŇč t…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôn, tan…ôŇč a sapibar~…ĺud. nina masajan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, ar~…ĺawńßan u badukukaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan, idaw ku " kitait satanajuaj nu papańßan r~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan " . isasa nu bujubujuan a kir~…ĺŇčakir~…ĺaŇčan ku r~…ĺaŇčaw nina kiwit, idadan ńßina adińß kita tu r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kiwitan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) badukukan tusa ku napapańßan a wajwaj, ¶a ¶aj ńßan patar~…ĺaajaw tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ saka tan…ôkt…ôk nu papańßan, duma satu sasipappar~…ĺan tu papańßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: "***".) ńßina adińß kita tu badukukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, misa s…ôŇči kunuńß…ôni, anu ¶aaj piadińß kita tu nikudan nu papańß tu sisasapar~…ĺan, utiińß kita amisa wantan tu r~…ĺaŇčawan, u kiwi tńßan ¶ajkar~…ĺ ¶ad, adińß sa matin…ôŇč tu kita. ńßamawsa kita mim…ôr~…ĺaw tu kiwit a r~…ĺaŇčawan nu papańß, maka adińß kitatu mańßidaaj u tar~…ĺudu nu papańßan, atu papańß nu sadikudaj idaw ku adidiaj a masa babuja atu sasapar~…ĺan nikaudipan a papańßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj nu kiwitan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, mańßida u akawaj, ar~…ĺawńßan u papańß nu akawaj, kiwitńßan nutat…ôŇčaaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw namaka r~…ĺamit atu akawaj namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺa amur~…ĺaŇčaw, namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj numu r~…ĺaŇčawaj a mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj, unu ¶a ¶aja ana papańßan. kiwit a papańß nu akawaj ńßidasatu amur~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) kiwit ńßan tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺai ¶, itini i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ńßan nu kiwitsa, tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu kanas, anu n…ô ¶n…ô ¶…ôn mar~…ĺa babanawan numita tu tupu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) bakańß…ôn numita i babińßan mar~…ĺa dam…ôk nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ikanńßan, numa Ňčaduaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan tan…ôŇč kan…ôn, kiwi tńßan tan…ôŇč saŇčasib…ôn mar~…ĺa nanum, miańß…ômaw tu udip, ¶aaj piŇčar~…ĺuńß. maŇčaduaj nu papańß tuktuk…ôn par~…ĺamr~…ĺam tu ¶ńßar-jou sakaj b…ôr~…ĺuńß, matuduńß nu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,**.) (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
